examples: Pruritus is an essential feature of atopic dermatitis.
Symptoms of atopic dermatitis usually begin between 1 and 3 years of age, though any age is possible.
Objective: To study the relationship between the serum taurine level and the occurrence of atopic dermatitis.
Atopic dermatitis most often begins in childhood before age 5 and may persist into adulthood.
Atopic dermatitis can also affect the skin around the eyes, including your eyelids.
